more.description: The Springboks proved once again why they are world champions, shaking off an early wobble before powering to a convincing 45-21 win over England in an entertaining Nations Championship clash at Ellis Park. more.title: Fuel relief arrives, but South Africans remain trapped between job losses, food costs and rising bills
more.description: A drop in fuel prices offers welcome relief, but South African households remain under pressure as unemployment rises, food costs stay elevated and municipal bills increase.

more.title: UK Promoter Y2K Entertainment Cuts All Ties With South African Music Industry Over Migrant Crisis Backlash
more.description: South Africa’s music industry has taken a serious international hit. UK-based Y2K Entertainment Promotions, a long-running promoter of Southern African music, announced on 2 July that it is withdrawing all support for South African artists. more.title: Springboks face ticket sales challenges ahead of England Test match
